overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person flight through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis at night. The player pilots a flying car through narrow corridors between neon-lit skyscrapers and massive digital billboards, descending toward a landing platform while navigating tight urban canyons.

events.description: descending from higher altitude between dense urban towers
exiting narrow building corridor into more open airspace

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying car through narrow urban canyons, descending between rain-soaked megastructures while avoiding building facades

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'DIO TECHNOLOGY' text on building facade
orange curved industrial pipe extending between buildings
tall building with large white '01' marker on the side
tall glass building with illuminated grid windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude flight through a dense cyberpunk cityscape in heavy rain. The camera descends between massive structures, passing the DIO TECHNOLOGY sign and a building marked with '01', navigating through narrow aerial corridors with neon-lit glass towers on all sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airspace above downtown with massive billboards

events.description: large ALL FOOD HOTEL billboard becomes visible on left side
banking right toward cylindrical megastructure with teal lighting

agents.ego_description: flying through open airspace above the city, navigating toward a distinctive cylindrical building while passing large commercial billboards

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard advertising ALL FOOD with HOTEL text below
large multi-level parking garage with visible ramps
rounded high-rise building with horizontal banding and neon accents
elevated curved roadway structure winding between buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into more open airspace, revealing the sprawling city below through the rain. A massive ALL FOOD HOTEL billboard dominates the left side while the camera banks toward a distinctive cylindrical megastructure. The scene features dense urban architecture with multiple levels of infrastructure and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban canyon with vertical advertisements

events.description: entering extremely narrow corridor between cylindrical building and adjacent skyscrapers
flying extremely close to building walls, nearly scraping the facade

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight urban canyon, banking sharply between illuminated skyscrapers and flying close to building surfaces

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying '3MONTHS 1DESIRE' and 'Sasha Yakin' in red neon
building facade with bright vertical teal neon strip lighting
vertical HOTEL sign in blue neon on building side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a claustrophobic urban canyon, flying between the cylindrical megastructure and adjacent towers. Bright vertical billboards including a red '3MONTHS 1DESIRE' advertisement and teal neon strips illuminate the rain-soaked corridor. The camera banks sharply to navigate the tight space, passing extremely close to building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-altitude landing approach corridor near building 54

events.description: building with large red '54' sign becomes prominent in the distance
slowing descent and aligning with landing platform ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching landing zone, flying toward building with red 54 signage, reducing speed for final descent onto the platform

entered.detail: large red square sign with white '54' text on building facade
elevated landing pad structure with illuminated edges ahead
tall building with vertical blue neon lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the destination, with the distinctive building 54 sign glowing red ahead. The vehicle slows its descent while aligning with a landing platform visible in the distance. The surrounding area features dense clusters of illuminated skyscrapers with various neon advertisements, while rain continues to fall through the night air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from the high-altitude peaks of a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis into a sprawling urban expanse. It begins by diving through narrow aerial corridors between neon-lit glass towers, passing the DIO TECHNOLOGY sign and a building marked with 01. As the camera navigates these tight spaces, the claustrophobic architecture gradually gives way to more open airspace. The scene then expands to reveal the vast city below, banking past a massive ALL FOOD HOTEL billboard toward a distinctive cylindrical megastructure. Finally, the view opens fully across multiple levels of glowing infrastructure and dense urban architecture under the heavy rain.

The shot follows a continuous flight through a claustrophobic urban canyon that gradually opens up as the vehicle approaches a designated landing zone. It begins by weaving between a cylindrical megastructure and adjacent towers, where bright vertical billboards and teal neon strips illuminate the rain-soaked corridor. As the camera banks sharply to navigate the tight space, it passes extremely close to the building facades before the narrow corridor begins to widen. The scene then shifts toward the final destination, aligning with a distant landing platform as the distinctive red glow of the building 54 sign emerges ahead. Finally, the vehicle slows its descent amidst a dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and falling rain, settling into the heart of the neon-lit metropolis.
